en_title: Bungie Communications Manager Says Destiny 2 fans Shouldn't Blame Themselves for Game Coming to an End
cn_title: Bungie经理：玩家无需为《命运2》终结自责
subtitle: 有时就是这样
opus_summary: Bungie宣布《命运2》停更，社区哀悼。通讯经理称玩家无需自责，感谢近十年支持。Bungie全力投入《失落星船：马拉松》，《命运3》未开发且可能裁员，前景黯淡。

paragraphs.en: Destiny 2 fans shouldn't "blame" themselves for Bungie choosing to end support for the game, says the company's comms manager.
paragraphs.cn: Bungie的通讯经理表示，《命运2》玩家不应为Bungie决定终止游戏支持而「自责」。

paragraphs.en: The Destiny community has been in mourning for about a month now after Bungie abruptly announced it would be ending support for Destiny 2 . Although the game will remain playable, Bungie will not be adding new content to the game. This came as a shock to its community, who assumed a bright future was ahead for the title, but that isn't the case.
paragraphs.cn: 自从Bungie突然宣布将终止对《命运2》的支持以来，《命运》社区已经沉浸在悲痛中约一个月了。虽然游戏仍可游玩，但Bungie不会再为游戏添加新内容。这令社区感到震惊，因为他们原本以为这款游戏将迎来光明前景，事实却并非如此。

paragraphs.en: One fan pondered over whether or not the community could have done more to support the game. Bungie communications manager Dylan Gafner responded by simply saying nothing more could be done and thanked fans for almost a full decade of support.
paragraphs.cn: 一位玩家思索社区是否本可以为支持这款游戏做得更多。Bungie通讯经理Dylan Gafner回应称，已不可能做得更多，并感谢玩家们近十年来的支持。

paragraphs.en: "You all have done more for this game and our studio than could ever be imagined, and no words can accurately depict how lucky we are to have shared these worlds with you," said Gafner. "Don’t blame yourselves or think you could have / should have done more. This is just the way it goes sometimes. No matter the future, we will always have these memories."
paragraphs.cn: 「你们为这款游戏和我们的工作室所做的一切远超想象，没有任何言语能准确表达我们能与你们共享这些世界是多么幸运，」Gafner说道。「不要自责，也不要觉得你们本可以或本应该做得更多。有时候事情就是这样。无论未来如何，我们永远都拥有这些回忆。」

paragraphs.en: Truthfully, it's hard not to look at some of the statements and vibes coming out of Bungie and not feel like things are bleak. Reports indicate that Destiny 3 is not in the works and that Bungie is bracing for "significant" layoffs. Former Bungie staff have also been reminiscing on dream projects they had in the Destiny universe, including a dating simulator.
paragraphs.cn: 说实话，看到Bungie近来的一些声明和氛围，很难不感到事态并不乐观。报道指出，《命运3》并未在开发中，并且Bungie正在准备迎接「大规模」裁员。前Bungie员工也纷纷回忆他们在《命运》宇宙中构思过的梦想项目，其中甚至包括一款恋爱模拟器。

paragraphs.en: Bungie will, of course, remain operational, as it is fully committed to supporting Marathon . But significant doubt has been cast on whether or not the team will get another shot at a big-budget AAA game again after Marathon failed to perform commercially. The games industry as a whole is in a tense place right now as it navigates economic hardships, meaning it's harder than ever to take chances on ambitious and expensive projects.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，Bungie仍会继续运营，因为它正全力投入对《失落星船：马拉松》的支持。但在《失落星船：马拉松》商业表现不佳之后，外界严重怀疑这个团队是否还有机会再制作一款3A级大作。整个游戏行业目前正处在经济困境之中，局势紧张，这意味着尝试那些雄心勃勃且耗资巨大的项目比以往任何时候都更加困难。

paragraphs.en: Maybe Bungie will get to make a big new game in the future, but such a project likely wouldn't see the light of day for many years.
paragraphs.cn: 也许Bungie未来有机会做一款大型新游戏，但这样的项目恐怕很多年内都难以问世。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人。他报道所有娱乐内容，包括游戏、电影等。你可以在X上找到他 @Cade_Onder。
